feedItems.description: allocated £35.4m to Roads & Transport (≈£56 per resident)
allocated £140.1m to Children's Social Care (≈£222 per resident)
allocated £216.7m to Adult Social Care (≈£343 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £87 (5.0%) to £1823
